note: No /index.astro route exists yet — Astro returns 404. Story #943 listed 302 as an aspirational target; pin to current behavior. Update to 302 when a root redirect lands.
Anonymous → 302 /sign-in?redirect_url=%2Fonboarding per Story #965 F1 SSR auth gate. Companion to Story #952's gate on /dashboard and /admin/*; closes the prior 200-with-form-shell leak.
Anonymous → 302 /sign-in per Story #952 F1 SSR auth gate. No more 200-with-chrome leak to anonymous callers.
Anonymous → 302 /sign-in per Story #952 F4 SSR auth gate. Signed-in non-admin would get 404 (non-enumeration per Epic #11 AC-2/AC-3); the smoke is anonymous, so it hits the sign-in redirect first.
Anonymous → 401 UNAUTHENTICATED; story #941 fixed the prior 500 regression. NOT 500.
Anonymous → 404 per AC-2/AC-3 SSR non-enumeration gate (PR #940)

Dev-only seam: mints a Clerk sign-in ticket and redirects through Clerk's ticket flow. Hard-refuses in production. Skipped when CLERK_SECRET_KEY is unset (e.g. fork PRs). assertLocationContains pins that Clerk accepted the seeded coach persona's user ID and returned a valid ticket in the Location header — a headless fetch cannot complete the browser-side exchange but this confirms the DB-seed/Clerk-persona seam is wired (Story #1008 — closes the persona-seed blind spot).
